allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix boot_ses_calc to default to no hypothesis test; add ses_calc unit tests

boot_ses_calc now defaults to alternative="none", matching ses_calc behavior.
When no test is requested, statistic/p.value/null.value are omitted from htest
output and method string reads "estimate with CI" instead of "test".

Added dedicated test file \(test-ses_calc.R\) covering ses_calc, boot_ses_calc,
and internal helpers \(rbs_calc, ses_compute_agresti, ses_ci_logodds,
ses_ci_fisher, compute_placements, var_concordance_*, to_logodds,
transformation round-trips\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\R\\R-4.4.2\\bin\\Rscript.exe" -e "
devtools::load_all\(quiet = TRUE\)
x_sep <- 1:5
y_sep <- 6:10

# Check the raw rbs_calc output
r_raw <- TOSTER:::rbs_calc\(x_sep, y_sep, mu = 0, paired = FALSE\)
cat\(''rbs_calc result:'', r_raw, ''\\n''\)

p_raw <- \(r_raw + 1\) / 2
cat\(''p_hat \(cstat\):'', p_raw, ''\\n''\)

# Check what ses_compute_agresti returns
agresti_res <- TOSTER:::ses_compute_agresti\(x_sep, y_sep, paired = FALSE\)
cat\(''agresti cstat:'', agresti_res$cstat, ''\\n''\)
cat\(''agresti rb:'', agresti_res$rb, ''\\n''\)
cat\(''boundary_corrected:'', agresti_res$boundary_corrected, ''\\n''\)
cat\(''p_hat_original:'', agresti_res$p_hat_original, ''\\n''\)
")
